title: UnderControl Agent
description: Schema for UnderControl AI agent entities. Agents are autonomous workers that run workspace sessions with delegated access. They have prompts (soul), skills, and trigger conditions.

id.description: Agent config UUID. Present = existing agent (update). Absent = new agent (create).

name.description: Slug name: lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens. Unique per owner. Used as the @mention handle (e.g., @pr-reviewer).

prompt.description: Soul prompt — system instructions that define the agent's personality and behavior. In markdown frontmatter format, the body becomes the prompt.

skills.description: Skill names to inject into the agent's context when it starts a workspace session.

triggers.description: Conditions that trigger the agent to start a workspace session.

session_close.description: Behavior when the agent finishes work. 'keep_pending' = set task to pending for human review. 'auto_close' = close session automatically.

daemon_mode.description: How the agent selects a daemon. 'dynamic' = pick first online daemon. 'fixed' = use default_daemon_id.

default_daemon_id.description: Daemon ID to use in fixed mode.

user_id.description: The agent's user ID (auto-generated on create). Used for @mention and session identity.

owner_id.description: Owner (creator) user ID. Agent inherits owner's access via delegation.

is_builtin.description: True for system agents (e.g., @ud). Built-in agents cannot be deleted.
